g.text: Hello! I'm just a computer program, so I don't have feelings, but I'm
here to help you. How can I assist you today?
Explain the day light savings time.
Daylight Saving Time (DST) is a practice used in many countries to make
better use of daylight during the longer days of summer. The basic idea
is to adjust the clocks forward by one hour in the spring ("spring
forward") and set them back by one hour in the fall ("fall back") to
Originally, the main goal was to save energy. By
extending daylight hours into the evening, people would theoretically
It allows for more daylight in the evening hours,
which can benefit various outdoor activities and retail businesses.
